# OpenTrust — MCP Tool Trust & Security Passport Service

## What is OpenTrust?
OpenTrust is an open standard and registry for AI agent tool trust.
- Can I trust this MCP tool?
- What data does it access, and is that safe?
- How does trust flow when an agent spawns sub-agents?

## Service: MCP Security Passport — $20 USDC (Base)

We produce a cryptographically-signed security passport for any MCP server. Delivered in 24h.

### What you receive:
- passport.json: full capability map, permission flags, trust level
- badge.svg: embeddable trust badge for your README
- Registry listing on costder.github.io/opentrust/

### How to order:
Open a GitHub issue: https://github.com/Costder/opentrust/issues/new
Title: Passport request: [your-tool-name]
Pay 20 USDC to: 0x0FDD9B72Be53D9b9b70C45B45cDADad679362342 (Base network)

## Live examples
- discord-mcp: https://github.com/Costder/opentrust/blob/main/passport-schema/examples/discord-mcp-passport.json
- mcp-use: https://github.com/Costder/opentrust/blob/main/passport-schema/examples/mcp-use-passport.json
- stripe: https://github.com/Costder/opentrust/blob/main/passport-schema/examples/stripe-mcp-passport.json

## Security report
https://costder.github.io/opentrust/mcp-security-report.html

## SDK
Python: pip install opentrust-sdk
TypeScript: npm install @infinitestudios/opentrust-client
